positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, circular mandala-style illustration featuring stylized bioluminescent celestial fauna and flora, such as glowing abstract moths, stylized antlers, and cosmic vines. The design must combine Art Nouveau flowing curves with deep cosmic patterns, incorporating elements like crescent moons, constellations, and nebulae swirls. The style should be clean vector illustration, intricate etching quality, rendered with extreme contrast, perfect symmetry, and a vibrant color palette of sapphire blue, iridescent violet, and gold neon accents. Composition must be centered and suitable for high-quality apparel printing. Intricate line art, full coverage pattern.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, grainy, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, cartoon, amateur, signature, signature, messy
